allies.rationale_text: Root-cause-analysis gives causal-attribution-resistance the procedural discipline needed to push past the first blame story toward the actual generative driver.
allies.source_quote: distinguish symptoms, proximate causes, and root causes

allies.rationale_text: Critical-thinking strengthens causal-attribution-resistance by forcing skepticism toward the most narratively satisfying explanation.
allies.source_quote: resist the first satisfying cause story

allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps causal-attribution-resistance see structural and environmental drivers that a person-centered blame story would miss.
allies.source_quote: look at incentives and structures, not just visible actors

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias undermines causal-attribution-resistance by locking onto the first plausible culprit and selectively reading later evidence through that story.
antagonists.source_quote: premature attribution hardens into a defended causal story

structured_tensions.tension_text: Causal-attribution-resistance conflicts with incentive-blind diagnosis when a moralized blame story hides the structural payoffs producing the behavior.
Causal-attribution-resistance conflicts with confirmation-bias when early blame stories are defended instead of reopened as causal evidence accumulates.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on root-cause, systems, and skeptical diagnosis allies plus explicit tensions with incentive-blind and confirmation-biased attribution.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor relation widening beyond the source-backed anti-blame and structural-causation surface.
open_questions: Narrative closure pressure is source-real, but it was omitted because the current graph vocabulary does not expose a clean target id for narratives.
